overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The car navigates through covered highways, passes a massive multi-armed statue in an open plaza, and stops at traffic lights on Sagan Avenue amidst towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: driving through covered highway section with large digital billboards on both sides

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on left side of highway
overhead concrete structure covering the roadway with integrated lighting
reflective wet road surface showing red tail light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a vehicle driving through a covered urban highway at night. Large digital billboards line both sides of the road, displaying vibrant advertisements. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights and vehicle taillights as the car approaches a tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with giant corporate statue

events.description: exits covered tunnel into open plaza revealing giant multi-armed statue
car turns right around the base of the giant statue

agents.ego_description: navigating around the massive multi-armed statue in the city center plaza

entered.detail: massive six-armed statue holding spheres, towering over the street level
multi-level highway structure passing overhead with support columns
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into a wide open plaza dominated by a massive multi-armed statue holding glowing spheres. The camera circles around the statue as futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. Elevated highways crisscross overhead, creating a layered urban canyon effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with elevated highways

events.description: car makes a sharp turn at intersection passing under elevated highway
passes red torii gate structure entering Japanese-inspired district

agents.ego_description: navigating through city streets making several turns past commercial buildings and under overpasses

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving in the opposite direction on the left side

entered.detail: traditional Japanese red gate structure marking district entrance
bright neon signs in Japanese and English advertising businesses

segments.scene_description: Driving through medium-width city streets lined with neon commercial signage, the vehicle passes under elevated highway structures. The architecture shifts to include a prominent red torii gate, indicating entry into a Japanese-inspired district. Other vehicles are sparse but present, including a white sedan passing in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: vibrant neon commercial district with holographic ads

events.description: car turns right at intersection with prominent purple neon building
approaches and stops at red traffic light at major intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising through densely packed neon-lit streets with heavy commercial signage and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk near bright neon storefronts

entered.detail: building facade illuminated with vibrant purple neon lights and circular patterns
large cylindrical building with horizontal neon lighting bands
floating holographic advertisement displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through a vibrant commercial district saturated with neon lighting. A distinctive purple-lit building dominates the right side, while holographic billboards float above the street. Pedestrians appear on the sidewalks, and the car makes a turn before approaching a traffic light at a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: Sagan Avenue intersection with traffic control

events.description: car comes to complete stop at red light on Sagan Ave
traffic light turns green and car begins to accelerate

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light on Sagan Avenue waiting for signal change before proceeding

notable_agents.action: silver car stopped ahead at the intersection waiting for the light

entered.detail: red street sign reading 'Sagan Ave' suspended over the intersection
traffic signal showing red light above the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red traffic light on Sagan Avenue, marked by a prominent red overhead sign. The intersection features crosswalk markings and other stopped vehicles ahead. Pedestrians are visible on the sidewalks, and the area is surrounded by neon-lit storefronts. The light changes to green, and the car begins to move forward.

events.description: enters darker covered highway section approaching tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: accelerating through covered highway section after leaving the intersection

entered.detail: dark tunnel opening at the end of the covered highway section
enclosed roadway with overhead lighting and side barriers

segments.scene_description: After the intersection, the vehicle accelerates into a darker, covered highway section. Digital billboards line the sides of the road, and the tunnel entrance looms ahead. The environment becomes more enclosed as the car approaches the tunnel, with artificial lighting replacing the open neon glow of the previous district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey through a neon-drenched metropolis, transitioning from enclosed highways into a sprawling open plaza before returning to a covered urban corridor. It begins on a wet, covered highway lined with digital billboards, moving forward until the car emerges from a tunnel into a wide plaza dominated by a massive multi-armed statue and layered overhead highways. The scene then shifts as the vehicle navigates through a Japanese-inspired district marked by a red torii gate, eventually entering a vibrant commercial zone saturated with purple lighting and floating holographic advertisements. After stopping at a red traffic light on Sagan Avenue amidst bustling sidewalks and neon storefronts, the car accelerates forward as the environment gradually closes in. The journey finally concludes as the vehicle leaves the open city streets behind, gliding back into a darker, enclosed highway section where artificial lights replace the open glow of the district.
